title: tricalysia jasminiflora
intro: Tricalysia jasminiflora is a plant species commonly known as the "jasmine flower tree" due to its fragrant and jasmine-like flowers. The medicinal properties of Tricalysia jasminiflora include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin infections. Tricalysia jasminiflora can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be used as a topical application in the form of a salve or cream.
